title: The Encounter Between Me and Onii-chan!!
overview: When Chitose Sakuraba, an eleven year old girl, declares her "hots" for Hiroshi Kashiwabara she plans to skip class to go see him, but her tutor Asako Fuji stands in her way.

title: The Marriage Meeting
overview: Chitose finds out that Hiroshi and Kouhai are having a marriage meeting, so must stop him at all costs as that sorta thing is for desperate people (in her mind).

title: An Adult's Charm?
overview: Chitose tries to figure out the best way to attract someone.

title: Daddy's Child
overview: Misaki tries to figure out what to do for Father's Day.

title: Hinako in Cosplay
overview: Hinako tries on various bits of cosplay.

title: Sketch
overview: Asako makes some curious observations during her class' drawing lesson.

title: Fire Drill
overview: The school practises a fire drill.

title: All Together!
overview: Hiroshi's attempt to get Chitose to play with her friends instead of bothering him backfires when she brings her entire class to his office.

title: The Usual Days
overview: Chitose is constantly foiled in her plans to escape to the town hall to see Hiroshi.

title: The Teacher's Achilles' Heel?
overview: Chitose struggles to come up with a wish for Tanabata.

title: Tanabata
overview: The girls try to learn Asako's weakness.

title: The Pool Opens
overview: Hinako picks a curious outfit for the swimming pool.

title: Summer Festival
overview: At a summer festival in town, both Chitose and Asako end up fighting when Hiroshi appears.

title: Reading Books in Autumn?
overview: Misaki has trouble picking out a library book for Book Week.

title: Sports Festival
overview: It's sports festival day at the school.

title: Mika Appears
overview: Chitose gets a new rival with the appearance of Hiroshi's Neice, Mika.

title: The Meal
overview: Chitose and Asako go to a restaurant with Hiroshi and get on each other's nerves.

title: Diet?
overview: Asako goes on a diet, which gives Chitose the idea to go on one herself.

title: Like a Girl
overview: After an awkward incident on the way to school, Chitose and Hinako try to help Misaki to behave more like a girl.

title: Christmas
overview: Chitose and Asako think of christmas presents to give to Hiroshi.

title: Spring Cleaning and Memories
overview: Chitose encounters some disturbing mementos of her mother's whilst spring cleaning.

title: New Year's Eve
overview: Chitose and co. go about giving New Year's greetings whilst Asako and Kouhai spend the day drinking.

title: Visiting the Temple for the New Year
overview: The gang visit the temple for the New Year.

title: A Day in the Life of Kashiwabara
overview: Hiroshi describes a typical day in his life.

title: Let's Do It Handmade
overview: Asako teaches the girls how to make handmade Valentine chocolates.

title: First One Wins
overview: Chitose and Mika argue over who gets to give Hiroshi their chocolate first and end up incurring Misaki's wrath.
